activation_gate: Deferred. Activate only after the current ComfyUI foundation, Wave70 Mask Factory, Waves71-76 base physics/deformation layers, runtime lanes, cost controls, and strict QA gates are stable enough that this expansion will not derail nearer project milestones. Activation requires an explicit source-cited project decision.

purpose: Add muscle flexion, grip strength, finger pressure, tendon tension, exertion, contact force, and audio-force alignment as first-class physics/deformation controls.

requirements.acceptance_criteria: muscle_activation_maps is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, muscle activation maps, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence muscle_activation_maps. It must support which muscles/regions are active from pose, weight bearing, grip, exertion, motion, or contact, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: which muscles/regions are active from pose, weight bearing, grip, exertion, motion, or contact. Required output: muscle activation maps.
requirements.title: Define muscle activation maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: muscle_flexion_maps is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, muscle flexion maps, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence muscle_flexion_maps. It must support localized biceps, forearms, shoulders, abdomen, thighs, calves, neck, jaw, and face tension/flexion, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: localized biceps, forearms, shoulders, abdomen, thighs, calves, neck, jaw, and face tension/flexion. Required output: muscle flexion maps.
requirements.title: Define muscle flexion maps

requirements.notes: Purpose: return-to-rest and release behavior after flexion, load removal, grip release, or exertion decay. Required output: muscle relaxation maps.
